name: ReRhythm
summary: AI-powered 28-day career coaching platform — parses resumes with AWS Textract, generates personalised roadmaps via AWS Bedrock (Claude), deploys on ECS Fargate with CloudFormation, DynamoDB, and KMS.
highlight: 🏆 Second runner-up — AWS Competition, UTA Symposium 2026

name: Portfolio Website
summary: Story-first GitHub Pages portfolio built with Eleventy, Nunjucks, and GitHub Actions — auto-deploys on every push to main.
